name: Alex Thompson
review: LearnHub completely changed my career trajectory. I went from knowing basic HTML to landing a senior developer role in just 8 months. The React bootcamp is hands-down the best course I've ever taken — Sarah's teaching style makes everything click.

name: Anika Patel
review: The UX Design Masterclass is unlike anything else out there. Marcus doesn't just teach Figma — he teaches you HOW to think as a designer. My portfolio went from zero to landing me a job at Spotify. Worth every single penny.

name: Carlos Mendez
review: Dr. Sharma's Python for Data Science course is incredibly comprehensive. I had zero ML background and by Module 4 I was building real neural networks. The real-world projects made all the difference — I used one as my portfolio piece in interviews.

name: Emma Wilson
review: I tried Udemy, YouTube, freeCodeCamp — nothing compared to LearnHub's structure and quality. The Node.js course got me my first backend job offer within 3 months. The community support is phenomenal too.

name: Ryan Park
review: Passed my AWS SAA exam on the first attempt after David's course. His explanations of complex architectures are incredibly clear. The practice exams in Module 6 were almost identical to the real test. 10/10 would recommend.

name: Fatima Al-Hassan
review: LearnHub's digital marketing course gave me a complete system I could apply immediately. Our startup went from 200 to 15,000 monthly users in 4 months using Olivia's growth strategies. This is real, actionable knowledge.
